strengths: Proven experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Strong background in software development with a focus on testability and user experience
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices architecture
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure

response.justification: Bogdan has a strong technical background with diverse experience across various technologies and programming languages, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure, and has no clear evidence of leading a large engineering team.
